caption: A close-up shot captures a car's digital instrument cluster as it prepares for startup. The display features a central message that reads "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," with the mileage "20434 mi" listed below it. Above this text, the word "BRAKE" is visible next to a red warning icon. The screen is flanked by circular gauges, one of which shows a speedometer with numbers ranging from 0 to 60. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static in composition, though there are subtle shifts in lighting and focus. A soft glow emanates from the red accents of the gauges, and a faint reflection of light streaks across the glass surface of the dashboard. No people are visible in the frames, focusing the entire scene on the vehicle's interior electronic interface.
